subject: Commonly Used Discrete Random Variables
topic: §21 Poisson Approximation to the Binomial Distribution
question: From a group of 120 engineering students, 3% are not in favor of studying diﬀerential equations. Use the Poisson approximation to estimate the probability that (a) exactly 2 students are not in favor of studying diﬀerential equations; (b) at least two students are not in favor of studying diﬀerential equations.
